purpose: Review source-backed platform capabilities after Kotlin walkthrough.

targetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie media picker photo library
set.notes: Source walkthrough found only packaged drawable and mipmap assets rendered by Compose Image composables. No PhotoAccessHelper, MediaStore, gallery query, album discovery, picker, or external media metadata flow exists in the source app.

targetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie file picker document SAF URI permissions
set.notes: Source walkthrough found no file picker, document open/import/export flow, content/file URI sharing, or filesystem read/write behavior. The app only uses bundled resources and in-memory/static data.

Source app displays bundled images in cards, ads, onboarding pages, and profile art only. No zoom, pan, gallery preview, EXIF, bitmap editing, or dedicated viewer gesture behavior exists in inspected source files.

targetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie string resources localization app resources
set.notes: Real source capability. The app depends on Android string, theme, color, icon, and drawable resources for onboarding, login, navigation, profile, detail, cart, and accessibility labels. Target planning should preserve resource-driven text and theming behavior.
Source walkthrough found no dangerous permission declarations in AndroidManifest.xml and no runtime permission request code. The generated row is a heuristic false positive for this app.

Source app has only standard Application and launcher Activity startup wiring with splash/theme setup. It does not define background work, services, receivers, providers, widgets, notifications, or home-screen integration. Startup lifecycle is tracked separately in an added reviewed capability row.

sourceEvidence.evidence: DataStore preference file user_login_state_pref stores boolean key user_login_state; toggleLoginState flips it; loginState exposes Flow<Boolean>.
Startup route is selected by reading repository.loginState.first() before clearing splash loading state.

add.sourceEvidenceSummary: LoginRepositoryImpl persists login state in Android DataStore preferences and SplashViewModel reads it to select onboarding versus home at startup.
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie preferences persistent key value storage
add.targetStrategyHint: Use HarmonyOS Preferences key-value storage for persisted login/session state and preserve startup route selection semantics.
add.minimumParity: Persist a boolean login flag across launches and resolve the initial route from that stored state before rendering the main shell.
requiredTests: startup route selection from persisted login flag test
allowedDeferredReasons: preferences API unavailable in selected SDK
targetCapabilitySearch: D:/workspace/Foodike/.agents/skills/cangjie-harmonyos-doc-search/harmonyos-6.1-8k/Guide/database/cj-data-persistence-by-preferences/通过用户首选项实现数据持久化/通过用户首选项实现数据持久化_5more_adada06c.md
add.notes: Reviewed during source walkthrough. Real capability with direct HarmonyOS Cangjie API evidence exists, but target implementation has not started yet, so status remains planned.

add.capabilityName: Startup route gating and main window lifecycle

sourceEvidence.evidence: Installs splash screen, keeps it visible while SplashViewModel.isLoading is true, then renders SetupNavigation(startDestination).
Theme.SplashScreenTheme defines splash background, animated icon, and postSplashScreenTheme.
Launcher activity uses Theme.SplashScreenTheme and application/theme wiring.

add.sourceEvidenceSummary: App startup is gated by splash/loading state and chooses onboarding or home before normal navigation shell rendering; activity/application/theme wiring participates in this behavior.
requiredTargetCapabilitySearch: HarmonyOS Cangjie startup splash window stage app lifecycle ability stage
add.targetStrategyHint: Map Android splash/startup behavior to HarmonyOS UIAbility and WindowStage startup flow while preserving delayed initial route selection and shell setup.
add.minimumParity: Do not show the main routed experience until persisted session state is resolved; then open onboarding or home with equivalent main-window content loading behavior.
allowedDeferredReasons: selected template lacks splash customization hook in current SDK
targetCapabilitySearch: D:/workspace/Foodike/.agents/skills/cangjie-harmonyos-doc-search/harmonyos-6.1-8k/Guide/windowmanager/cj-application-window-stage/管理应用窗口/设置应用主窗口_c9facda4.md
add.notes: Reviewed during source walkthrough. HarmonyOS docs show UIAbility/WindowStage main-window setup hooks; target implementation remains future work.
